title: thamnosma stanfordii
intro: Thamnosma stanfordii, also known as Ephedranthus stanfordii, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include the presence of ephedrine, a stimulant that can help to increase alertness and circulation. The health benefits of Thamnosma stanfordii include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to treat other conditions like fever and muscle spasms. The herbal preparations of Thamnosma stanfordii typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves, which can be used to make teas or tonics for medicinal purposes.
